conservative.name: Okkam's Mindrazor
conservative.requirements:
8 power
Target within medium range; you must be able to make eye contact with target

success.description: You reach into the target's mind and tear it savagely! The target gains a temporary insanity with the Enigma, Supernatural, or Trauma trait, then suffers wound equal to the total severity of insanities he suffers from
As above, but reveal 3 insanities and choose 1 to apply to the target as a temporary insanity (ignoring traits)

bane.description: You gain a temporary insanity with the Enigma, Supernatural, or Trauma trait

sigmarsComet.description: Choose a temporary insanity suffered by yourself or an ally within medium range. That insanity is moved to the target (it retains the same number of tracking tokens) before resolving this action
